query:
-- Check how many services now have connectionId populated (AVC IDs)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_internet_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN connectionId IS NOT NULL AND connectionId != '' AND connectionId LIKE 'AVC%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_avc_connection_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN connectionId IS NULL OR connectionId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_connection_id
FROM services
WHERE serviceType = 'Internet';

-- Check how many vocus_nbn_services now have a matched service
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_vocus_nbn,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND internalServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS matched_to_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NULL OR internalServiceExternalId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unmatched
FROM vocus_nbn_services;
